overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit cyberpunk nightclub. The clip transitions from an upper balcony view to the rainy exterior featuring the 'RED MART' building, then enters through the crowded entrance to explore the checkered-floor interior with bars and neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony railing overlooking the lower level of the club

entered.detail: horizontal green neon light tubes running along the ceiling beams
black metal safety railing along the balcony edge
lower floor illuminated with red lighting visible below the balcony
back wall covered with various posters and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from an upper balcony inside a cyberpunk nightclub. Green neon strips illuminate the ceiling while the camera walks along a metal railing overlooking a red-lit lower dance floor. The space is relatively empty with industrial architecture and poster-covered walls visible in the background.

events.description: cut from interior club to exterior rainy street scene

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the RED MART building through the gathered crowd

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing in front of the building entrance

entered.detail: large commercial building with dark facade and prominent signage
bright red neon sign reading RED MART on building facade
massive concrete and steel overpass looming above the street
rain-slicked street reflecting the orange streetlights and neon signs
tall street lamp casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the exterior night environment, showing the approach to the RED MART building with its prominent red neon sign. The camera moves through a crowd gathered on the wet asphalt street beneath a massive industrial overpass, illuminated by warm orange street lamps.

events.description: entering the building through the main entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking up the entrance steps and through the doorway into the club interior

notable_agents.action: character in shiny silver jacket standing guard near the entrance doorway

entered.detail: large open doorway leading into the club interior
distinctive yellow and red checkered tile pattern on the club floor
pink neon light strips illuminating the interior walls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the entrance of the RED MART, transitioning from the wet exterior to the interior. The checkered floor pattern becomes visible inside as the camera passes a bouncer in a shiny jacket and enters the neon-lit lobby area.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub main floor with bar and seating

agents.ego_description: walking through the main club floor observing the bar area and crowd

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the main bar counter
patrons sitting at round tables and standing in groups

entered.detail: long bar counter with stools and bottles lined up behind it
circular tables with patrons seated around them
raised platform with purple lighting at the far end of the club
horizontal pink neon tubes mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the main club interior, revealing a checkered dance floor, a long bar counter on the left with a bartender working, and round tables where patrons sit. Pink neon lights illuminate the walls while a stage area is visible in the far background.

scene_state.functional_zone: back bar area with pool tables and restrooms

events.description: turning left to follow the bar counter toward the back area

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar counter toward the back area with pool tables

notable_agents.action: patron leaning over the bar talking to the bartender

entered.detail: green felt pool table with players standing nearby
double doors with illuminated signs at the back of the club
glowing vending machines against the back wall
wall with small dark tiles behind the bar area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow the bar counter deeper into the club, revealing a pool table area on the right and restroom doors at the back. The space becomes less crowded with vending machines visible against the tiled walls near the back exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the industrial heights of a nightclub balcony, through a rainy city street, and back into the neon-drenched depths of a club interior. It begins along a metal railing under green neon strips overlooking a red-lit dance floor before shifting to the wet asphalt of a night street beneath a massive industrial overpass. As the camera moves through a crowd toward the glowing red sign of the RED MART, the scene transitions from the rainy exterior through a guarded entrance and onto a checkered floor. The view then expands into the main club area, where pink neon lights illuminate a long bar and patrons at round tables. Finally, the camera turns left to follow the bar deeper into the venue, passing a pool table area and vending machines against tiled walls toward the back exit.
